title: Delicate Citrusy Korean Kielbasa Kalguksu
description: A light and tender Korean dish featuring kielbasa, with a citrusy twist and a hint of chocolate, made in a low-fat friendly kalguksu style.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the kalguksu noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the sesame oil over medium heat and cook the sliced kielbasa until browned.
Add the orange zest, orange juice, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Temper the chocolate by melting it in a double boiler and then whisking it into the skillet with the kielbasa mixture.
Drain the cooked noodles and add them to the skillet, tossing to combine with the kielbasa and chocolate sauce.
Transfer the kalguksu to a serving dish and garnish with chopped green onions.
Garnish with additional orange zest if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
